sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sihna kuam gal khat-ah khua lianpi khat om hi,
Minthan nate kigen khin zo lo;
ni tum lo, singteh vul ngei lo,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua munah thuman mi’ maitang Topa’n en ding,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua mun i it kumpi hong tanpa Topa om,
Tua munah thuman mite aksi bang tang ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Singlamteh phung i tunpih khit sa kha khempeuh,
Lukhu zep nading suang manpha bang kikem hi,
